nodes.name: 鸟纲
nodes.summary: 鸟纲（Aves）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: 动物界

nodes.name: Sumba jungle flycatcher
nodes.summary: The Sumba jungle flycatcher (Eumyias stresemanni) is a passerine bird in the Old World flycatcher family Muscicapidae that is endemic to Sumba. The Sumba jungle flycatcher was split as distinct species from the russet-backed jungle flycatcher (Eumyias oscillans) by the IOC in 2021. References

nodes.summary: Eumyias（Eumyias）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联11种鸟类，如Matinan blue flycatcher、Blue-fronted blue flycatcher、Timor blue flycatcher等11种鸟类。
